PREFIX psn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/>

SELECT ?duration(xsd:float(?durationValue) AS ?durationMinutes) WHERE {
  ?edition wdt:P31 wd:Q1363275 ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(xsd:dateTime(?date) >= "1978-01-01T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime)

  ?game wdt:P2047 ?duration .
  ?duration pq:P2547 wd:Q120718 .
  ?duration psn:P2047 ?durationValue .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?durationValue)
LIMIT 1
